description: Elan is a QGIS decision-support plugin that aims to facilitate integrated urban water management by nature-based solutions. Using this plugin, the user can create and compare different urban water management scenarios (wastewater and stormwater) to support informed decision making. Elan has been developped from 2021.

funder.name: Office français de la biodiversité, Interreg Caraïbes, Agence française de développement

name: Elan
